channel.title: Met Office Weather Warnings - South West England
channel.description: Met Office Weather Warnings for South West England

item.title: Yellow warning of Rain affecting South West England
item.description: Heavy rain expected, valid from 0800 Wed 12 Mar to 2000 Wed 12 Mar

item.title: Amber warning of Wind affecting South West England
item.description: Strong winds expected, valid from 1200 Thu 13 Mar to 0600 Fri 14 Mar

item.title: Red warning of Snow affecting South West England
item.description: Heavy snow expected, valid from 0000 Fri 14 Mar to 1200 Fri 14 Mar
